description: A retain sample has passed its required retention period and must be disposed of.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all retain samples that are past their disposition date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of samples to be destroyed.

nodes.task_description: For the first sample on the list, update its status in the LIMS to 'Pending Disposal'.
After physically disposing of the sample according to procedure, log the disposal date and method in the LIMS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent records the final disposition details, completing the sample's lifecycle.
